channel.description: The channel that the membership is describing. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.development.channel record on the channel owner's repository.

invite.description: The original invite record for the channel. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.development.channel.invite record on the channel owner's repository.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this membership was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when this membership was last updated.

main.description: Record declaring the state of a user's channel membership.
